name: Lemon Ginger Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the meat into thin bite-size pieces, cutting across the grain.
2. Combine the meat with cornstarch, sherry, 1 tablespoon oil, and garlic. Marinate for 30 minutes.
3. Prepare the Lemon Ginger Sauce; set aside.
4. Heat a wok or skillet. Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of oil.
5. Stir fry the meat for 2 to 3 minutes, or until just cooked. Remove from the pan and set aside.
6. Add carrot and onion to the pan. Stir fry for 2 minutes.
7. Add green beans and cover. Steam for 2 minutes, or until tender crisp.
8. Add mushrooms and Lemon Ginger Sauce. Bring to a boil and cook, stirring constantly, until thickened and translucent.
9. Add the meat back to the pan and heat through.
10. Serve over cooked rice, if desired. Makes 4 servings.
Lemon Ginger Sauce: Combine all ingredients; mix well.
